meaning: n.(委员会、董事会等对一专题的)集体考虑,集体审议
examples: This “groupthink” occurs when people copy one another.
We can combat groupthink by nurturing authentic dissent.
Meetings are a good place to discover whether an organization might be suffering from groupthink.
Anticipate which sectors will see money inflow and then challenge groupthink on specific stocks axiomatically.
